cases.title: AC-08e: simulation disabled uses real geolocation; simulation enabled honors gpsSim=delay without real GPS permission
preconditions: Active session sess-1 with valid QrToken and enrolled student Pending attendance
Authenticated Student session cookie
Two web build profiles available: production (VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false) and harness/preview (flag true)
Room GPS at 10.762622, 106.660172 with 100 m radius per testing-plan §11 geo fixtures
steps: Production profile: load /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsSim=delay&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200 with simulation flag off
Assert client does not auto-resolve coordinates from gpsSim or gpsLat/gpsLng query params
Assert navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition is invoked instead of simulation layer
Harness profile: load same URL with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
Assert gpsSim=delay resolves in-room coordinates without real GPS permission prompt
POST /api/v1/check-in with harness-resolved coordinates and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success
cases.expected: AC-08e and NFR-24 device API fidelity: production builds ignore URL sim params and use browser geolocation; test/demo builds with flag on honor demo-guides §7 simulation params per 08-acceptance-mvp-future §AC-08e

cases.title: preview-sim module no-ops when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
preconditions: Device simulation module (preview-sim) imported with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false at build time
parseGpsSimParams and parseCameraSimParams helpers wired to check-in GPS and camera acquisition paths
URL search params include gpsSim=delay, cameraSim=grant, gpsLat=10.762700, gpsLng=106.660200
steps: Invoke parseGpsSimParams with gpsSim=delay and coordinate overrides
Assert return value indicates simulation disabled (null or passthrough to real geolocation)
Invoke parseCameraSimParams with cameraSim=grant
Assert return value indicates simulation disabled (null or passthrough to getUserMedia)
Invoke resolveSimulatedGeolocation with gpsSim=delay when flag is false
Assert helper does not resolve synthetic coordinates and delegates to navigator.geolocation contract
cases.expected: NFR-24 integration contract: preview-sim helpers no-op when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false per local-development-setup §4 and testgen coverage hint; real device APIs remain sole acquisition path

cases.title: preview-sim resolves gpsSim modes when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
preconditions: Device simulation module built with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
Session room coordinates 10.762622, 106.660172 configured as in-room default
Test harness controls fake timers for gpsDelayMs and gpsTimeoutMs params
steps: Invoke resolveSimulatedGeolocation with gpsSim=delay and default delay; assert in-room coordinates returned after delay
Invoke with gpsSim=timeout and gpsTimeoutMs=500; assert GpsDisabled outcome semantics without calling navigator.geolocation
Invoke with gpsLat=10.764122 and gpsLng=106.660172 overrides; assert override coordinates returned for out-of-radius scenarios
Invoke with gpsSim=deny; assert permission-denied simulation path triggers permission guide flow hook
Verify navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition is not called when simulation layer handles the request
cases.expected: NFR-24 test/demo build contract: query-param simulation layer active when flag on; all demo-guides §7 gpsSim modes resolve deterministically without real GPS hardware

cases.title: GPS acquisition path transitions from sim-disabled to real-API when simulation flag is off
preconditions: Check-in GPS acquisition orchestrator wired to preview-sim module and geolocation wrapper
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false at module load
URL contains gpsSim=delay attempting to force simulated ready state
steps: Record beforeState: gpsState idle, simulation layer inactive
Initiate GPS capture on GpsCaptureStep mount with gpsSim=delay in URL
Assert simulation layer skipped; navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition invoked
Supply mocked in-radius position via test harness geolocation mock
Record afterState: gpsState ready with coordinates from geolocation mock, not URL params
cases.expected: beforeState idle with sim params present but ignored; afterState ready via real geolocation API per NFR-24 production semantics and AC-08e

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in succeeds in E2E harness with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true and gpsSim=delay
preconditions: Playwright E2E config sets VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true per testing-plan §8
API running against Compose PostgreSQL with preview seed active session
Authenticated enrolled Student session; valid-token-id alias resolves to Valid QrToken
Student navigated via /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsSim=delay&cameraSim=grant with sim flag on
steps: Complete browser check-in flow using simulation params without granting real GPS or camera
Capture POST /api/v1/check-in request body latitude and longitude from network log
Assert HTTP status 200 OK with outcome Success and attendance.status Present
Assert submitted coordinates are in-room values from gpsSim=delay default, not arbitrary overrides
Query qr_tokens and assert token status Consumed
cases.expected: HTTP 200 check-in contract satisfied in E2E harness with device simulation enabled; NFR-24 test build path validates FR-07 and FR-08 without physical device per testing-plan §8 browser gate

cases.title: Production build ignores gpsSim, cameraSim, gpsLat, and gpsLng query params
preconditions: Web build compiled with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default per 10-local-development-setup §4)
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with valid QrToken; GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid
Deep link includes gpsSim=delay, cameraSim=grant, gpsLat=10.762700, gpsLng=106.660200
steps: Load /check-in?token=:tokenId&gpsSim=delay&cameraSim=grant&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200 with simulation flag off
Assert GpsCaptureStep does not auto-reach ready state solely from URL params without geolocation grant
Assert cameraSim=grant does not bypass getUserMedia when scanner step mounts with scannerOnly=1
Without granting real geolocation, assert POST /check-in cannot succeed using only URL coordinate overrides
Optionally assert dev-console warning logged that simulation params are ignored when flag is off
cases.expected: NFR-24 production target: all demo-guides §7 query params ineffective when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false; client uses real getUserMedia and geolocation per 07-non-functional-risk §NFR-24

cases.title: Harness happy path: gpsSim=delay and cameraSim=grant complete check-in without real device permissions
preconditions: Playwright harness web server started with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
Student student@example.edu.vn logged in on mobile viewport
Active session sess-1 with valid-token-id alias
Preview stack seeded per demo-guides §5
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsSim=delay&cameraSim=grant
Wait for preflight pass and GpsCaptureStep to reach ready substate
Assert Vị trí đã sẵn sàng visible without real GPS permission dialog
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh and wait for outcome panel
Assert Điểm danh thành công (Present) displayed per demo-guides Script A step 4
cases.expected: NFR-24 test/demo build: simulation layer enables desktop E2E and demo rehearsal without physical GPS or camera per demo-guides §7 and testing-plan §8

cases.title: Harness gpsSim=timeout resolves to GpsDisabled outcome when simulation flag on
preconditions: VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true in harness web build
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Valid token deep link with gpsSim=timeout and gpsTimeoutMs=500 per demo-guides §7
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsSim=timeout&gpsTimeoutMs=500
Wait for GPS capture step to process simulated timeout
Assert outcome panel shows GPS chưa bật (GpsDisabled) Vietnamese message
Assert help link or permission guide affordance visible per AC-08c
Assert Xác nhận điểm danh remains disabled or submit blocked
cases.expected: Simulation flag on: gpsSim=timeout deterministically triggers GpsDisabled UX without real 15 s geolocation wait; NFR-24 enables fast harness iteration per demo-guides §7

cases.title: Harness gpsLat/gpsLng override produces OutOfRadius only when simulation flag on
preconditions: VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true in harness
Student studentc@example.edu.vn logged in (enrolled, out-of-radius test persona)
Valid token for active session; room center 10.762622, 106.660172
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsLat=10.764122&gpsLng=106.660172 per demo-guides Script B step 3
Complete preflight and submit check-in with simulated out-of-radius coordinates
Assert outcome Ngoài phạm vi phòng học (OutOfRadius) displayed
Repeat same URL on production build (sim flag off) without granting real GPS
Assert coordinates from URL override are ignored; check-in cannot reach OutOfRadius outcome without real geolocation
cases.expected: gpsLat/gpsLng override effective only when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true; production build ignores overrides per NFR-24 and demo-guides §7

cases.title: Production build browser journey invokes real getUserMedia and geolocation despite sim query params
preconditions: Web build with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false served on test port
Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Page instrumented to record getUserMedia and getCurrentPosition calls
URL includes gpsSim=delay and cameraSim=grant query params
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&gpsSim=delay&cameraSim=grant with simulation flag off
Trigger QR scanner mount with scannerOnly=1 if needed
Assert navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia called; synthetic cameraSim layer not used
Advance to GpsCaptureStep after preflight pass
Assert navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition invoked; gpsSim=delay did not bypass real API
cases.expected: NFR-24 production fidelity: real device APIs used exclusively when simulation flag off regardless of URL params per AC-08e and 07-non-functional-risk §NFR-24

cases.title: mockLocation=1 simulation param triggers SpoofSuspected only when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
preconditions: Harness build with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid QrToken
In-room coordinates available via gpsSim=delay
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=valid-token-id&gpsSim=delay&mockLocation=1 with sim flag on
Submit check-in and capture POST /api/v1/check-in response
Assert HTTP 400 or 422 with outcome SpoofSuspected per AC-10a
Repeat on production build with mockLocation=1 in URL and real geolocation mocked in harness
Assert mockLocation URL param ignored; spoof detection relies on real device signals or API spoofMetadata only
cases.expected: mockLocation query param is part of demo-guides §7 simulation layer and ineffective when flag off; NFR-24 separates test harness spoof scenarios from production device signals

cases.title: Real device check-in on mobile Safari/Chrome without simulation params
preconditions: Production or staging build with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
Physical iOS 15+ Safari or Android 10+ Chrome on same LAN or ngrok tunnel per demo-guides Script F
Instructor displays live QR at /sessions/sess-1/qr-present
Student account student@example.edu.vn with camera and GPS permissions grantable
steps: Student scans live QR from instructor display; deep link opens /check-in?token=… without gpsSim or cameraSim params
Grant camera permission when QR scanner requests getUserMedia
Grant location permission when GPS step requests geolocation
Submit check-in and assert Điểm danh thành công outcome
Verify no simulation query params were required for successful Present
cases.expected: NFR-24 production path validated on physical device matrix: real camera and GPS APIs per NFR-18 without simulation layer per demo-guides Script F note
